category_sources: Official flagd docs describe it as a feature flag evaluation engine and OpenFeature-compliant backend system.
source_facts.description says flagd is a feature flag daemon.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and repository use flagd as the project name.
docs_sources: Official flagd.dev documentation includes introduction, quick start, installation, concepts, guides, and CLI reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official flagd docs mention OpenFeature compliance, gRPC streams, OFREP service, and POSIX-style CLI configuration.
source_facts.description says feature flag daemon with a Unix philosophy.
